ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "game_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the game (e.g., M for Mature 17+) */,
  "game_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "game_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "game_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "game_platforms" TEXT /* List of platforms the game is available on */,
  "game_developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "game_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's cover image */,
  "game_trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer video */,
  "game_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales of the game */,
  "game_user_engagement" INTEGER /* Metrics for user engagement (e.g., number of plays, average playtime) */,
  "game_is_published" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the game is published and available for sale */,
  "game_in_stock" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the game is in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "review_is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the review has been approved by a moderator */,
  "review_is_spam" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the review is marked as spam */,
  "review_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_device" TEXT /* Device used to write the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, moderator) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "user_date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "user_is_staff" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user has staff privileges */,
  "user_avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_favorites" TEXT /* List of favorite games (as game IDs) */,
  "user_purchases" TEXT /* List of purchased games (as game IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
